summary: This bundle records deterministic proof for product-owned live-run workspace allocation, one-time prepare-hook timing, and the public packet/template boundary.

evidenceScope.targetSurface: product-owned live-run scripted loop workspace boundary
evidenceScope.claimBoundary: Only the scripted product-owned live-run loop and explicit request-batch workspace markers are marked satisfied.
notClaimed: Remote live-run authentication or session management
Adapter-configurable workspace roots beyond the current output-file-relative path

notableAssertions: eval live run allocates a stable workspace at <output_file>.d/workspace for a product-owned scripted loop
workspace_prepare_command_template runs once before scripted turns
each consumer single-turn command receives the same workspace_dir placeholder value
the public live-run result packet does not expose the workspace directory path
eval live run-scenarios writes nested per-request result files and each request has a prepared workspace marker

decision.reason: The cited CLI smoke tests prove the product-owned live-run loop allocates one stable workspace, runs the prepare hook once, routes workspace_dir through adapter placeholders, and keeps the workspace path out of the public result packet.
